title: Bonney Meets the Crew
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Bonney, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I'm off to find some weapons and deal with vegapunk. Catch ya late--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get outta here!! He's about to charge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then why did it just pop out like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surely the damage he's causing is worse than what we did!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is he trying to kill us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's a bit harsh for theft!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be toast if we don't fight back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then again, we are pirates. Hostile hosts come with the territory...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Either way, we've got no choice!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you see his lazers?! I've gotta slug him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you said your Dad was turned into a cyborg...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
